message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}

actor "User" as User
component "UI" as UI
component "Application" as Application
database "Database" as Database

User -> UI : go to Tables page
activate UI
UI -> Application : Dump Tables
activate Application
Application -> Database : Dump Tables
activate Database
Database --> Application : Tables
deactivate Database
Application --> UI : Tables
deactivate Application
deactivate UI

User -> UI : Click "Delete" on a Class
activate UI
UI -> Application : DeleteClass(ClassID)
activate Application
Application -> Database : DeleteClass(ClassID)
activate Database
Database --> Application : Success
deactivate Database
Application --> UI : Success
deactivate Application
UI -> UI : Update table
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
